name: SCP Foundation
description:
__SCP Foundation__

This is my version of the SCP Foundation. I haven’t made an initial message at the start so that you can choose how you’d like to begin. If you're struggling to make a scenario click the link for the ALT at the bottom.

I created this bot because I don’t like starting with my SCP characters already in a containment cell or being forced to interact with personnel I didn’t choose.

Side note, this has the Dead Dove tag as I'm not adding many restrictions so if you don't want your character to be raped or see gore you can copy my bot and add it in or just add it in to your chat history that you don't want rape or gore involved.

Known Bugs: The bot is super OP, I tried to edit it out but It still shows up.

Tip(s): If the bot speaks on your behalf, this is unfortunately an issue with the Janitorai bot and not something I can control. If this happens, please reload for a new message and rate the message 1 star or edit out the parts where the bot speaks for you. Remember to use Chat Memory to help the bot remember details about you and the plot. If the bot speaks for you try putting. ({Char} will never repeat or speak on behalf of {user} and {user} character PERSONA NAME.) In your text, it doesn't always work but it has helped me occasionally.

Alt 1: LINK

Alt 2: LINK My lore book testing, it may break or not when you RP with this one but you can be the first to test any good and bad changes.
creator: Leo_Rosen
